summary: Iteration 31 - Catalog expansion from 20 to 35 procedures with universal flow model. All 16 features tested and passed. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog_data.py correctly implements 35 entries with universal flow model
All official procedures have flow_definition with official_entry_point, expected_release, tracking_mode
All internal procedures have flow_definition=None as expected
Real Italian government portal URLs used (telematici.agenziaentrate.gov.it, inps.it, registroimprese.it, starweb.infocamere.it)
SUAP_SCIA correctly has url_verified=false since SUAP portals vary by municipality
seed_data_creation: Catalog seeded with 35 entries from catalog_data.py on server startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested catalog expansion to 35 entries. All tests passed. Key verified: (1) GET /api/catalog returns 35 entries. (2) GET /api/catalog/categories returns 5 categories with counts: fiscale=14, previdenziale=5, societario=5, documentale=7, informativo=4. (3) New entries exist: INCOME_TAX_PF, INCOME_TAX_730, LIPE_QUARTERLY, CU_CERTIFICATION, INTRASTAT, CASSETTO_FISCALE, VISURA_CAMERALE, INFO_REGIME_FORFETTARIO, INPS_DURC, INPS_ARTIGIANI, INPS_COMMERCIANTI, COMPANY_FORMATION_SRL, COMPANY_VARIATION, SUAP_SCIA, ATECO_VARIATION. (4) INCOME_TAX_PF has flow_definition with official_entry_point (URL, auth_method=SPID), expected_release (type=protocol_number, timing=delayed), tracking_mode (type=portal_status). (5) COMPANY_FORMATION_SRL has delegation_required=true. (6) SUAP_SCIA has url_verified=false. (7) Internal entries (STATUS_UPDATE) have flow_definition=None. (8) Frontend shows 35 procedure cards with correct category counts. (9) CHI FA COSA shows 5 badges for INCOME_TAX_PF. (10) Search by 'INPS' returns 5 entries.

details: INCOME_TAX_PF exists with category=fiscale, official_action, flow_definition
flow_definition.official_entry_point has real URL (telematici.agenziaentrate.gov.it) and auth_method=SPID
Category cards show: Fiscale 14, Previdenziale 5, Societario 5, Documentale 7, Informativo 4
INCOME_TAX_PF expanded shows 5 badges: Herion prepara, Tu invii, Tu firmi, Delega possibile, Risposta ente attesa
